ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pronouns" (
  "pronoun_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pronoun form */,
  "person" TEXT /* Grammatical person (e.g., 1st, singular; 2nd, plural) */,
  "number" TEXT /* Number (singular or plural) */,
  "subjective_case" TEXT /* Subjective case form of the pronoun (e.g., I, you, he/she/it/they) */,
  "objective_case" TEXT /* Objective case form of the pronoun (e.g., me, you, him/her/it/them) */,
  "dependent_possessive" TEXT /* Dependent possessive form of the pronoun (e.g., my, your, his/her/its/their) */,
  "independent_possessive" TEXT /* Independent possessive form of the pronoun (e.g., mine, yours, his/hers/its/theirs) */,
  "reflexive" TEXT /* Reflexive form of the pronoun (e.g., myself, yourself, himself/herself/itself/themself/themselves) */,
  "formality" TEXT /* Formality level (e.g., formal, informal, neutral) */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language the pronoun is used in */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender associated with the pronoun form */,
  "dialect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific dialect within the language */,
  "example_sentence" TEXT /* Example sentence using the pronoun */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pronoun_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pronouns_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pronouns_dialect_id FOREIGN KEY ("dialect_id") REFERENCES dialects ("dialect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pronouns_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language */,
  "family" TEXT /* Language family (e.g., Indo-European) */,
  "script" TEXT /* Primary writing script used (e.g., Latin, Cyrillic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender category */,
  "is_gender_neutral" INTEGER /* Indicator if the gender is neutral */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pronoun_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pronoun usage event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content where the pronoun is used */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific sentence within the content */,
  "pronoun_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pronoun form used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the pronoun form is used */,
  "tone" TEXT /* Tone of the usage (e.g., formal, casual) */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context or type of content (e.g., formal document, social media post) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pronoun_usage_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pronoun_usage_pronoun_id FOREIGN KEY ("pronoun_id") REFERENCES pronouns ("pronoun_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "content_title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "content_text" TEXT /* Text of the content */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the content (e.g., academic, fiction) */,
  "audience" TEXT /* Intended audience (e.g., general public, scholars) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the content */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the content was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the content was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, editor, researcher) */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dialects" (
  "dialect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dialect */,
  "dialect_name" TEXT /* Name of the dialect */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language the dialect belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dialect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dialects_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)
